name: 3pk Traditional Ceramic Gnome Pot Stake - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of charm and character to your garden with these 3-Pack Traditional Ceramic Gnome Pot Stakes from Threshold™. Each piece is sized to nestle neatly into pots, planters or garden soil, bringing a playful yet classic look, and the ceramic construction pair well with seasonal florals, herbs or outdoor decor. Easy to place and ready to display straight out of the box, these gnomes bring whimsical style to your outdoor space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
